misc.text: Candelle could be doing the same thing Garling did at God Valley. After gaining influence in the kingdom, she may have recommended Esperia for the next hunting games to the Gorosei, and after it ended, took Gunko to Marijoa and turned her into a Holy Knight? #ONEPIECE1183

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1183 I like the idea that Candelle was a member of the Holy Knights who infiltrated the country as a spy to gather information. That is why Gunko was later able to become a Holy Knight hersel
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1183 I like the idea that Candelle was a member of the Holy Knights who infiltrated the country as a spy to gather information. That is why Gunko was later able to become a Holy Knight herself and be accepted into the Holy Land, because her mother was a Holy Knight.
